properties.Test Case: Make a Bloom Pack of Shell Books. Install it. The collection should be located in C:\Users\XXX\AppData\Local\SIL\Bloom\Collections\ and should show up under Sources For New Books after you restart Bloom. Verify all the books were included and are intact. Make a derivative of a couple.
